calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-08-2011 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-08-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff G & $ Property Mangement is present. Represented by Rosalind Gardner.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants Richard Farrell and Ron Hewlett are present.
Attorney Gerald Launay specially appearing for defendants.

The Judge Pro Tem Ora Prochovnik, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.

The trial date of DEC-12-2011 is vacated.
